response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript/Node.js and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, aligning with parts of the role. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, cloud-platform AI design (AWS/GCP/Azure), and Python — all core requirements. Customer-facing technical leadership experience is also not evident.
strengths: 13+ years shipping production software across TypeScript, Node.js, and polyglot stacks
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq
Strong software-craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, mentoring, public talks
concerns: No demonstrated Python experience or RAG/vector-database/LLM-evaluation work
Limited evidence of cloud-platform AI architecture beyond AWS CDK for pricing systems
No clear customer-facing technical-discovery or forward-deployed consulting track record
